title: Freshworks Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Freshworks Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
jsonLd.skills: Kubernetes, Java, Go, AWS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, CI/CD
